# neon_branch_neon_auth_oauth_provider (Resource)

Manages a NeonAuth OAuth provider on a branch.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "neon_branch_neon_auth_oauth_provider" "example" {
  project_id    = "your-project-id"
  branch_id     = "your-branch-id"
  type          = "standard"
  client_id     = "your-oauth-client-id"
  client_secret = "your-oauth-client-secret"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `branch_id` (String) The Neon branch ID.
- `project_id` (String) The Neon project ID.
- `type` (String) The OAuth provider type (e.g. `standard`, `shared`).

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `client_id` (String) The OAuth client ID.
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) The OAuth client secret. Conflicts with `client_secret_wo`.
- `client_secret_wo` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) The OAuth client secret (write-only). The value is not stored in Terraform state. Conflicts with `client_secret`.
- `client_secret_wo_version` (String) A version identifier for the write-only client secret. Update this value to trigger an update when `client_secret_wo` changes.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The OAuth provider ID (e.g. `google`, `github`, `microsoft`, `vercel`).
